value.text: Evidence: Manual temp validation completed. In /tmp/pm-zw0n-8v7IkI, ran 'node dist/cli.js install npm:pm-github --project' (installed pm-github@2026.6.4) and 'node dist/cli.js package doctor --project --detail deep --trace' (status=ok, warning_count=0, command paths include github export/import/sync/validate + gh-issues import). Runtime contracts availability includes github actions/commands. Auth preflight verified via isolated no-credential run in /tmp/pm-zw0n-auth3-qQBmWM with HOME empty + PATH node-only (no gh): 'pm github export --repo unbraind/pm-cli --apply --json' returned expected preflight warning and error detail '--apply requires a GitHub token (set GITHUB_TOKEN/GH_TOKEN or run gh auth login)'. Added UX doc clarification in docs/EXTENSIONS.md. Linked integration tests passed via pm test run (46 tests).
